description: Blue leather watch from maxima with classic minimalist styling and matte plating for a sporty edge. Built with precision quartz movement for accuracy, this watch is as hard-wearing as it is stylish. Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 11 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 Year Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfort Ssteele logo on the 12-hour mark Blue leather straps with a butterfly clasp Blue dial with quartz movement Screw to reset time and alarm with a protective steel cover Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters -wearable while washing hands and in mild rain Comes in an authentic Maxima tin case
